title: acalypha communis var. rotundata
intro: Acalypha communis var. rotundata, also known as the Round-leaved Copperleaf, is a variety of the Acalypha communis plant, a shrubby herb native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha communis var. rotundata include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to prevent malaria and other diseases. Acalypha communis var. rotundata is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be crushed and applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
